stages.concept:
# Unit 129: 관계대명사 what - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **관계대명사 what**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> **What** I want is a new computer.
> 내가 원하는 것은 새 컴퓨터이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **what = the thing(s) which/that** — ~하는 것

👩‍🏫 선생님: what은 **선행사를 포함**하는 관계대명사예요! 다른 관계대명사와 달리 앞에 선행사가 없어요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **주어** 역할:

> **What** he said is true.
> 그가 말한 것은 사실이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **목적어** 역할:

> I don't understand **what** you mean.
> 나는 네가 의미하는 것을 이해하지 못하겠다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **보어** 역할:

> This is **what** I wanted.
> 이것이 내가 원했던 것이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 주의! **what 앞에 선행사를 쓰면 안 돼요!**

> ❌ the thing **what** I need
> ✅ the thing **that** I need
> ✅ **what** I need

**Q. 다음 문장의 괄호 안에 알맞은 단어를 고르세요.**
"This is exactly (       ) I wanted to buy."
1. what ✅
2. which
3. that

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요. 빈칸 앞에 수식을 받을 명사(선행사)가 없고, '내가 사고 싶었던 **것**'으로 해석되므로 선행사를 포함하는 관계대명사 what이 와야 해요.

🧑‍🎓 학생: what = the thing(s) that! 선행사를 포함하고 있어서 앞에 선행사를 쓰면 안 되는 거군요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 129: 관계대명사 what - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
(     ) I got from my mom is a new bag.
> **정답** What

---

**02.** I don't understand ? he said.
> **정답** what

---

**03.** ? matters most is health.
> **정답** What

---

**04.** She showed me ? she made.
> **정답** what

---

**05.** ? I need is a good rest.
> **정답** What

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
That I want is some water.
(~하는 것)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** That → What

---

**07.** I don't know that she said.
(그녀가 말한 것을)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** that → what

---

**08.** Which I need is a new pen.
(내가 필요한 것)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Which → What

---

**09.** He showed me that he bought.
(그가 산 것)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** that → what

---

**10.** That matters most is kindness.
(가장 중요한 것)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** That → What

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
내가 원하는 것은 행복이다.
I want is happiness.
> **정답** What

---

**12.** 그가 말한 것을 이해 못 하겠다.
I don't understand he said.
> **정답** what

---

**13.** 가장 중요한 것은 건강이다.
matters most is health.
> **정답** What

---

**14.** 그녀가 만든 것을 보여 줘.
Show me she made.
> **정답** what

---

**15.** 내가 필요한 것은 새 신발이다.
I need is new shoes.
> **정답** What

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
내가 원하는 것은 쉬는 것이다.
What want I is rest
> **정답** What / I / want / is / rest

---

**17.** 그가 한 것은 옳았다.
What did he was right
> **정답** What / he / did / was / right

---

**18.** 나는 그녀가 말한 것을 믿는다.
believe I what she said
> **정답** I / believe / what / she / said

---

**19.** 가장 중요한 것은 노력이다.
What most matters is effort
> **정답** What / matters / most / is / effort

---

**20.** 그가 산 것을 보여 줘.
Show what me he bought
> **정답** Show / me / what / he / bought
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 129: 관계대명사 what - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
A: ___________________ I like to order is a grilled
steak. How about you?
B: Well, I will have _________________ you are
having.
who
that
which
what
> **정답** what

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
The book is _________________ Tom lent me.
The main character of the book _____________ is
venturous is my favorite.
what - whose
that - that
that - who
what - who
• venturous 모험을 좋아하는
> **정답** what - who

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Tom ______________ hobby is planting flowers is
my friend.
Planting flowers is __________________ I also like.
who - what
whose - what
that - what
whose - that
> **정답** whose - what

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
I felt sorry for ________________ I did to Amy.
But, Amy _____________ is still mad at me will not
forgive me.
what - whom
that - who
what - who
which - that
> **정답** what - who

---

**05.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
This is the sandwich what made them have a
stomachache.
His rudeness is what sometimes makes me
angry.
The boy that lives next door often visits me
with delicious snacks.
The woman whose scent was nice just passed
me by.
• rudeness 무례함
> **정답** This is the sandwich what made them have a
stomachache.

---

**06.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
What she wanted them to do is to clean the
house.
We ordered everything what was on the
menu.
I was looking for my essay homework that I
finished yesterday.
Tom took some medicine that was on the
shelf.
> **정답** We ordered everything what was on the menu.

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
나는 Amy에게 내 주머니 안에 든 것을 보여주었다.
I showed Amy the things which were in my
pocket.
I showed Amy the things what was in my
pocket.
I showed Amy what was in my pocket.
I showed Amy the things what were in my
pocket.
> **정답** I showed Amy the things which were in my
pocket., I showed Amy what was in my pocket.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
사람들은 자신이 한 일에 대해 책임을 져야한다.
People should be responsible for what they
have done.
People should be responsible for the thing
which they have done.
People should be responsible for that they
have done.
People should be responsible for the thing
what they have done.
> **정답** People should be responsible for the thing which
they have done., People should be responsible for
what they have done.

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
그게 정확히 내가 너에게 말하고 싶었던 것이다.
That is exactly which I wanted to tell you.
That is exactly the thing that I wanted to tell
you.
That is exactly what I wanted to tell you.
That is exactly the thing what I wanted to tell
you.
> **정답** That is exactly the thing that I wanted to tell you.,
That is exactly what I wanted to tell you.

---

**10.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 나머지 넷과 다른 것을 고르시오.
This is the book ________ I am looking for.
I told Amy ________ I heard from Tom.
He took out ________ was in his wallet.
________ is cheap is not always good.
> **정답** This is the book ________ I am looking for.

---

**11.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 나머지 넷과 다른 것을 고르시오.
Can you please show me ________ is in your
hand?
________ he said was a lie.
He saw his friends ________ were fighting
over a girl.
Amy told Tom ________ she knew about the
issue.
> **정답** He saw his friends ________ were fighting over a girl.

---

**12.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 나머지 셋과 다른 것을 고르시오.
Tom finished ________ his mother told him to
do.
________ I read on the newspaper may not be
a fact.
They don't believe ________ the exams will be
harder this time.
Amy perfectly understood ________ the
teacher explained.
> **정답** They don't believe ________ the exams will be
harder this time.

---

**13.** 다음 빈칸에 what을 쓸 수 없는 문장을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
I saw a house ________ roof was covered with
snow.
I'd like to see ________ is on the list.
That's not ________ he planned to do.
The man ________ is washing the car is my
father.
> **정답** I saw a house ________ roof was covered with
snow., The man ________ is washing the car is my
father.

---

**14.** 다음 빈칸에 what을 쓸 수 없는 문장을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
They should decide ________ is right.
I know some boys ________ can dance very
well.
I can guess ________ she will do next.
Parents give their children everything
________ they have.
> **정답** Parents give their children everything ________ they
have., I know some boys ________ can dance very
well.

---

**15.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Tom didn't know that
everybody else knew.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** that → what

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She is the smartest girl what
I have ever seen.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** what → that

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
A girl what name is Amy is
my best friend.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** what → whose

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I couldn't understand that my
sister said.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** that → what

---

**19.** 다음 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
My mother usually cooks ________ I like.
which
who
that
what
> **정답** what

---

**20.** 다음 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
I enjoyed the book _______ you told me to read.
what
which
that
whose
> **정답** that, which
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 129 관계대명사 what중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
나는 그 식당에서 맛있어 보이는 것을 주문했다.
힌트 (     ) look, delicious
I ordered  (     )   (     )   (     )  in the restaurant.
정답 what, looked, delicious

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
그가 우리를 위해 요리한 것은 호박 수프였다.
힌트 (     ) cook
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  was pumpkin
soup.
정답 What, he, cooked, for, us

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
Kelly는 자신의 눈앞에서 벌어졌던 일을 믿을 수 없었다.
힌트 (     ) happen
Kelly couldn't believe  (     )   (     )  before her eyes.
정답 what, happened

---

**04.** 주어진 문장을 관계대명사 what을 이용하여 바꾸어
쓰시오.
The things which Tom hid in his drawer was the exam
result.
→  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  was
the exam result.
정답 What, Tom, hid, in, his, drawer

---

**05.** 다음 문장을 what을 이용해 다르게 나타내시오.
I will tell my parents the thing that is on my mind.
→ I will tell my parents  (     )   (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 what, is, on, my, mind

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
내가 알고 싶었던 것은 그의 주소였다.
힌트 (     ) to, I, know, what, wanted
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  was his
address.
정답 What, I, wanted, to, know

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
신화란 증거도 없이 사람들이 믿는 것이다.
힌트 (     ) without, what, believe, proof, people
Myth is  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 what, people, believe, without, proof

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
나에게 중요한 것은 내가 꿈꾸는 대학에 들어가는 것이다.
힌트 (     ) is, to, me, what, important
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  is to enter the
university I dream of.
정답 What, is, important, to, me

---

**09.** 다음 문장 중 틀린 부분을 고쳐 쓰시오.
That I want to be is a fashion designer.
→  (     )  is a fashion
designer.
정답 What I want to be

---

**10.** 다음을 영작하시오. (관계대명사 what과 축약형을
사용할 것)
나는 너가 하는 말을 믿지 않는다. [believe, say]
I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 don't, believe, what, you, say

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 129: 관계대명사 what - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
A: ___________________ I like to drink is a fresh smoothie.
How about you?
B: Well, I will have _________________ you are having. who that which what
> 정답: what

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The pen is _________________ Amy lent me.
The color of the pen _____________ is bright blue is my favorite. what - whose that - that that - who what - which
> 정답: what - which

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Tom ______________ hobby is drawing pictures is my friend.
Drawing pictures is __________________ I also enjoy. who - what whose - what that - what whose - that
> 정답: whose - what

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I felt sorry for ________________ I did to Amy.
But, Amy _____________ is still upset with me will not forgive me. what - whom that - who what - who which - that
> 정답: what - who

---

**05.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
This is the cookie what made them feel sick.
His laziness is what sometimes makes me worried.
The girl that lives upstairs often visits me with fresh cookies.
The man whose smile was warm just passed me by.
> 정답: This is the cookie what made them feel sick.

---

**06.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
What she wanted them to do is to organize the room.
We ordered everything what was on the menu.
I was looking for my art project that I completed yesterday.
Tom took some vitamin pills that were on the table.
> 정답: We ordered everything what was on the menu.

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
나는 Tom에게 내 가방 안에 든 것을 보여주었다.
I showed Tom the things which were in my bag.
I showed Tom the things what was in my bag.
I showed Tom what was in my bag.
I showed Tom the things what were in my bag.
> 정답: I showed Tom the things which were in my

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
사람들은 자신이 말한 것에 대해 책임을 져야한다.
People should be responsible for what they have said.
People should be responsible for the thing which they have said.
People should be responsible for that they have said.
People should be responsible for the thing what they have said.
> 정답: People should be responsible for the thing which

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
그게 정확히 내가 너에게 보여주고 싶었던 것이다.
That is exactly which I wanted to show you.
That is exactly the thing that I wanted to show you.
That is exactly what I wanted to show you.
That is exactly the thing what I wanted to show you.
> 정답: That is exactly the thing that I wanted to show you.,

---

**10.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 나머지 넷과 다른 것을 고르시오.
This is the toy ________ I am looking for.
I told Amy ________ I heard from Tom.
He took out ________ was in his pocket. ________ is free is not always bad.
> 정답: This is the toy ________ I am looking for.

---

**11.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 나머지 넷과 다른 것을 고르시오.
Can you please show me ________ is in your bag? ________ she said was true.
He saw his classmates ________ were arguing over a seat.
Amy told Tom ________ she knew about the matter.
> 정답: He saw his classmates ________ were arguing over a seat.

---

**12.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 나머지 셋과 다른 것을 고르시오.
Tom finished ________ his teacher told him to do. ________ I saw on the screen may not be real.
They don't believe ________ the project will be delayed.
Amy perfectly understood ________ the coach explained.
> 정답: They don't believe ________ the project will be

---

**13.** 다음 빈칸에 what을 쓸 수 없는 문장을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
I saw a house ________ wall was covered with ivy.
I'd like to see ________ is on the menu.
That's not ________ he planned to say.
The boy ________ is washing the dishes is my brother.
> 정답: I saw a house ________ wall was covered with

---

**14.** 다음 빈칸에 what을 쓸 수 없는 문장을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
They should decide ________ is correct.
I know some girls ________ can sing very well.
I can guess ________ he will do next.
Parents give their children everything ________ they need.
> 정답: Parents give their children everything ________ they

---

**15.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Tom  didn  't  know  that everybody  else  found  out. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
